info.name: data-exchange-uc1-meter-data.vc-revocation
info.description: DEDI revocation checks for the vcvalidator middleware, using did:web credentials issued by OpenCred 1.9.0 with a credentialStatus pointing to a DeDi revocation registry (namespace did:web:did.cord.network:76EU7h2q..., domain ameetdesh.github.io). The unrevoked credential's DeDi lookup returns 404 (not revoked) -> ACK; the revoked credential's lookup returns 200 (record exists) -> NACK CREDENTIAL_REVOKED. Run the data-exchange devkit first (install/: docker compose up -d) on an image that includes the DEDI-aware revocation check.

request.description: credentialStatus -> DeDi; lookup 404 (no revocation record) -> not revoked. Via BAP caller (signed) -> full pipeline ACK.
